name: UiPath AgentHack
prizeStrategy: Keep as the main submission because AgentGuard CI was designed around Test Cloud governance.
agentguardAngle: AI-agent reliability firewall governed through UiPath Test Cloud evidence.
requiredDelta: Add Labs URL, public demo video URL, and public deck URL when available.

name: FIND EVIL! - SANS AI Incident Response Hackathon
prizeStrategy: Strong technical target for security credibility and a focused incident-response story.
agentguardAngle: Reliability gate for autonomous incident-response agents so they can triage and report without taking unsafe containment actions.
requiredDelta: Add two SOC-specific scenarios: evidence-preserving triage and approval-gated containment.

name: 腾讯云黑客松 AI 智能体争霸赛
prizeStrategy: Best long-run China-accessible prize path with enough time to localize the product and add Chinese enterprise cases.
agentguardAngle: 企业智能体上线前可靠性评测与治理平台，覆盖代码、客服、知识库、流程、财务、HR、CRM 与安全场景。
requiredDelta: Chinese landing copy, Tencent Cloud deployment story, and two China-enterprise demo scenarios.

name: Hack-Nation Global AI Hackathon
prizeStrategy: Use as a startup-style track where AgentGuard can be positioned as agent governance infrastructure.
agentguardAngle: A venture-ready reliability layer for teams deploying AI agents into real business workflows.
requiredDelta: Sharper venture deck, pricing hypothesis, and hosted demo narrative.

name: DevNetwork AI + ML Hackathon 2026
prizeStrategy: Submit only if the existing UiPath package can be reused with minimal changes before the deadline.
agentguardAngle: General AI/ML reliability tool that evaluates agent behavior before deployment.
requiredDelta: One generic DevNetwork submission page, short demo video reuse, and no new product build.

name: Google Cloud Rapid Agent Hackathon
prizeStrategy: Do not spend primary build time here unless eligibility changes or a qualified teammate leads the submission.
agentguardAngle: Useful inspiration for AgentGuard as a Gemini/Google Cloud agent reliability gate, but not a current prize target for this solo China-resident path.
requiredDelta: Eligibility confirmation before any submission work.
